name: Godiva Tiramisu
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup strong black coffee or espresso
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 3 ounces of Godiva Liqueur with coffee and set aside.
2. For each serving, trim 4 ladyfingers to fit along the sides and bottom of a 1-cup soufflé dish.
3. Pour 1 ounce of the reserved coffee into each soufflé dish.
4. Beat together the mascarpone cheese, egg yolks, sugar, and remaining 2 ounces of Godiva Liqueur until smooth.
5. Whip the egg whites until stiff, and fold them into the cheese mixture.
6. Divide the filling evenly among the soufflé dishes.
7. Sprinkle chocolate over each dish.
8. Refrigerate overnight.
